name: jwt_tool
description: Toolkit for testing, forging, and cracking JSON Web Tokens. Supports multiple attack modes including algorithm confusion, key confusion, and brute-force cracking.

metadata.ai_description: jwt_tool is a comprehensive toolkit for auditing and attacking JSON Web Token (JWT) implementations. Use it when you encounter JWT-based authentication in web applications. It can test for algorithm confusion (none algorithm), weak HMAC secrets via brute-force, RSA key confusion, JWK header injection, and kid injection. Supports crafting custom tokens with arbitrary claims.
use_cases: Cracking weak JWT HMAC secrets via wordlist
Forging JWTs with custom claims for privilege escalation
JWK header injection and kid injection attacks
limitations: Requires a valid JWT token to begin testing
Brute-force cracking is only effective against weak secrets
Some attacks require knowledge of the server-side key type
May trigger rate limiting or WAF detection

parsing.extraction_hint: Extract cracked secrets, forged tokens, successful exploits, payload contents, and any authentication bypass findings

examples.description: Test JWT for algorithm confusion and common attacks
